LOBBY37.TEX.description: Top banners + KDD legal text + Terms of Use paragraphs

subtex_notes.0: Top banner — "FIND PLAYER" (was JP banner). Re-rendered with rotate(-90, expand=True) for the vertical-strip atlas layout the DC sampler expects.
subtex_notes.1: KDD legal text + Terms paragraphs as multi-line vertical strips. All vertical strips get the same text (game samples one strip at multiple screen X positions — observed empirically).

LOBBY38.TEX.description: Lobby/menu HUD strips (PERSONAL STATUS, descriptions, L-trigger help)

subtex_notes.2: Yellow headers — PERSONAL STATUS, Save IDs, etc.
subtex_notes.4: Random Match / Beginner Only button labels. v23 redraw used mode=clean to erase old upside-down pixels from the v18 rotate(+90) bug.
subtex_notes.7: Current Players label — bumped font size to fix fuzziness.
subtex_notes.12: Lトリガーでログ閲覧 -> "L Trigger: view log"

CFGJP.TEX.description: Config screen — controller diagram + key configuration labels

subtex_notes.3: Three views of the Dreamcast gamepad (front, top, side).

CFGUS.TEX.description: US controller-config TEX — sibling of CFGJP.TEX

COCKPITJP.TEX.description: In-game HUD overlay sprites (BOSS, TOP, character poses, kanji headers)

DPTEX/TAG_SU.PVR.description: Paletted PVR — popup-button atlas. 512x512 PAL_8BPP TWIDDLED_MIPMAP, uses BANK01.PVP palette (NOT BANK00 — that renders rainbow).

subtex_notes.note: Byte-identical across 5 DP3 games (Spawn, JoJo, Net de Tennis, Project Justice, Vampire Chronicle) — translate once, ship 5x.
